text: Glenohumeral Instability Product Innovations Knotless SutureTak® Anchor Launched 2015 Knotless 1.8 FiberTak® Anchor Launched 2017 Knotless 1.8 FiberTak GEN2 Anchor Launched 2022 Knotless 1.8 FiberTak GEN3 Anchor Launched 2025 Just Pass It, Cinch It, Cut It Reference 1. Loeb AE, Moore Z, Ithurburn MP, et al. Outcomes of glenoid labral repair using all-suture anchors. Orthop J Sports Med . 2025;13(5):23259671251338802. Tensionable Knotless Instability Anchors Refined technology with proven results for over 10 years Over 1 million implanted worldwide 95% Return to Preinjury Level of Sport 1 Knotless all-suture anchors provide several clinical advantages, including ease of use, shorter operative times, improved tensioning across the repair, and being more glenoid-preserving compared to traditional knotted hard-body anchors. 1 Refined repair suture with optimized tapered tail in additional colors Easily identifiable black/blue shuttle stitch ■ Suture tension can be controlled and adjusted under direct visualization ■ No risk of knot impingement or knot loosening ■ Simple, reproducible insertion and passing techniques ■ Secure tissue with simple or mattress stitch configurations Tensionable Knotless 1.8 FiberTak® Soft Anchor Curved Straight Straight Straight, SlottedTight Curved Circumferential Teeth Fishmouth1.8 and 1.9 mm (Hard Bone) Flexible, Spade-Tip Drills 1.8 and 1.9 mm (Hard Bone) Rigid, Fluted Drills Comprehensive Portfolio of Guided Instrumentation Knotless FiberTak ® Implant System Simple, Refined, and Proven Technology in One Convenient Package ■ Three Knotless 1.8 FiberTak implants with unique suture colors ■ Tapered curved guide with trocar and drill ■ 5 mm low-profile cannula percutaneous kit Blue Repair Stitch Blue/Black Repair Stitch White/Blue Repair Stitch Percutaneous Anchor Placement Insert obturator and 5 mm low-profile cannula over guidewire Position curved guide through cannula to drill and insert anchor Precisely localize portal with needle and guidewire *Implants in kit will have new black/blue shuttle link in late 2025 Knotless Simple Stitch Knotless Mattress Stitch Knotless Cinch Stitch PushLock® Knotless Suture Anchors ■ Knotless techniques minimize the number of surgical steps and save time ■ No risk of knot impingement ■ Cannulated design minimizes anchor volume ■ Suture tension is visualized and adjusted prior to anchor insertion ■ Available in BioComposite or PEEK material and in two sizes (2.4 mm and 2.9 mm short) Multiple Suture and Stitch Configurations Knotless 1.8 FiberTak Anchor ■ Small, percutaneous instrumentation Knotless 2.6 FiberTak Anchor ■ Higher pull-out strength in acute injury settings 2 ■ Broader repair suture for increased soft-tissue compression Knotless FiberTak ® Soft Anchor for Recurrent Instability Reduce the risk of recurrent dislocation with remplissage 1 ■ For patients at risk of dislocation, combining remplissage with Bankart repair can reduce the risk of dislocation to as low as 4%1 ■ Knotless 1.8 or 2.6 FiberTak anchors both provide strong, knotless fixation that can be interconnected for broad soft-tissue compression References 1. Woodmass JM, McRae S, Lapner P, et al. Arthroscopic Bankart repair with remplissage in anterior shoulder instability results in fewer redislocations than bankart repair alone at medium-term follow-up of a randomized controlled trial. Am J Sports Med . 2024;52(8):2055-2062. doi:10.1177/03635465241254063 2. Funakoshi T, Hartzler R, Stewien E, Burkhart S. Remplissage using interconnected knotless anchors: superior biomechanical properties to a knotted technique? Arthroscopy . 2018;34(11):2954-2959. doi:10.1016/j.arthro.2018.06.030. Anatomic Aiming Hook (5 mm or 7 mm Offset) Laser Marks for Safe and Precise Drilling TransGlenoid Posterior Drill Guide ■ Innovative arthroscopic surgical technique that preserves the integrity of the subscapularis 1 ■ Two interconnected FiberTape® and TigerTape™ cerclage sutures provide firm compression and strong fixation of the graft that minimizes construct displacement at high loads 2,3 References 1. Deployable distal wings prevent cannula “fall-out” and allow for tissue retraction Telescopic inner sleeve provides a clear, unobstructed view and access to the pathology Low-Profile Cannula Percutaneous Kit Precisely place a small 5 mm clear cannula for direct visualization of curved FiberTak® guides, crescent SutureLasso™ suture passer, suture retriever, and mini suture cutter.
